source: PseudoForge reviewed ntoskrnl 10.0.26200.8457 ALPC port, message, resource, view, and security-context role-only identity pack; no private field offsets.

profiles.source: Reviewed NtAlpcCreatePort wrapper into AlpcpCreateConnectionPort under a critical region.
Reviewed AlpcpCreatePort object allocation with AlpcPortObjectType and output port object initialization.
